scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/runtime.test.js dist/tck-values.test.js dist/type-utils.test.js dist/dmn-parse.test.js dist/dmn-emit.test.js
scripts.tck:1.1.cl2: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/batch.test.js tck-cases/1.1/cl2
scripts.tck:1.1.cl3: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/batch.test.js tck-cases/1.1/cl3 -o out/cl3.1.1
scripts.tck:all: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/batch.test.js tck-cases -o out/all
